name: Sanyang Motor Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanyang Motor Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells motorcycles and automobiles in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers its products under the SYM brand. It also exports various self-developed machines, and molds and jigs, as well as provides professional services related to prototype parts processing to auto markets. The company was formerly known as Sanyang Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sanyang Motor Co., Ltd. in January 2015. Sanyang Motor Co., Ltd. was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Hukou, Taiwan.
